    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT,
    typeName TEXT,
    location TEXT,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)

name: combinationDB

sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS combination (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT,
    deviceType TEXT,
    description TEXT,
    created_at  TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now', 'localtime')),
    updated_at  TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now', 'localtime'))
)

name: 获取config

sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS config (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT,
    description TEXT,
    created_at  TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now', 'localtime')),
    updated_at  TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now', 'localtime'))
)
name: ConfigDB

sql:
CREATE TABLE config_relays (
    id            TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    config_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES config(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    relay_name    TEXT NOT NULL,         -- KA1, KA2, X1 ...
    default_status INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,  -- 1 / 0
    sort_order    INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    UNIQUE(config_id, relay_name)
  );
name: Config_relays

sql:
CREATE TABLE device_combination_bindings (
    device_id      TEXT NOT NULL,
    combination_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (device_id, combination_id),
    FOREIGN KEY (device_id)      REFERENCES device(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (combination_id) REFERENCES combinations(id)  ON DELETE CASCADE
  );
